Summary: Do what was agreed in the sign-off meeting
Acceptance criteria: Given agreement exists When I do it Then the release should be approved
Description: As a developer I want to do what was agreed in the sign-off meeting so that the release can proceed

Summary: Address the concerns from the vendor assessment
Acceptance criteria: Given vendor findings exist When I address them Then the integration should be smooth
Description: As a developer I want to address the concerns from the vendor assessment so that the integration works

Summary: Do whatever is needed for the milestone
Acceptance criteria: Given milestone is approaching When I do whatever is needed Then the milestone should be met
Description: As a developer I want to do whatever is needed to achieve the project milestone so that we stay on track

Summary: Address the feedback from the review board
Acceptance criteria: Given review comments exist When I address them Then the board should approve
Description: As a developer I want to address the feedback from the review board so that the design is approved

Summary: Make the changes as per the user feedback
Acceptance criteria: Given feedback exists When I make changes Then the users should approve
Description: As a developer I want to make the changes as per the user feedback collected during the demo so that users are satisfied

Summary: Implement the solution as per the meeting notes
Acceptance criteria: Given meeting notes exist When I implement Then it should match the design
Description: As a developer I want to implement the solution as per the meeting notes from the architecture session so that the design is followed

Summary: Complete the work from the requirements document
Acceptance criteria: Given requirements exist When I complete Then all should be satisfied
Description: As a developer I want to complete the work from the requirements document so that all requirements are implemented

Summary: Do the needful for the integration test
Acceptance criteria: Given test requirements exist When I do the needful Then the integration test should pass
Description: As a developer I want to do the needful to prepare for the integration test so that the testing can proceed

Summary: Address the concerns from the code quality report
Acceptance criteria: Given quality report exists When I address them Then the code should be cleaner
Description: As a developer I want to address the concerns from the code quality report so that the code meets standards

Summary: Make it work like the sample application
Acceptance criteria: Given sample exists When I implement Then it should behave similarly
Description: As a developer I want to make it work like the sample application that was shown so that we follow best practices

Summary: Implement the changes from the design session
Acceptance criteria: Given design session output exists When I implement Then it should match the design
Description: As a developer I want to implement the changes from the design session that was conducted last week so that the design is implemented

Summary: Complete the work from the iteration plan
Acceptance criteria: Given iteration plan exists When I complete Then the iteration should be successful
Description: As a developer I want to complete the work from the iteration plan so that we deliver the iteration goals

Summary: Do what was specified in the requirement traceability matrix
Acceptance criteria: Given RTM exists When I do it Then all requirements should be implemented
Description: As a developer I want to do what was specified in the requirement traceability matrix so that all requirements are covered

Summary: Address the feedback from the operational review
Acceptance criteria: Given feedback exists When I address it Then the operations team should approve
Description: As a developer I want to address the feedback from the operational review so that the system is operations-ready

Summary: Make the changes as per the lessons learned document
Acceptance criteria: Given lessons document exists When I make changes Then the same mistakes should not repeat
Description: As a developer I want to make the changes as per the lessons learned document so that past mistakes are avoided

Summary: Implement the solution as per the technical specification document
Acceptance criteria: Given spec document exists When I implement Then it should match the spec
Description: As a developer I want to implement the solution as per the technical specification document that was approved so that the implementation is correct

Summary: Complete the work from the project closure checklist
Acceptance criteria: Given closure checklist exists When I complete Then the project should be ready for closure
Description: As a developer I want to complete the work from the project closure checklist so that the project can be closed
